evals.prompt: I just installed the web-search-dev plugin but I'm not sure which of the search services are actually working. Can you check which ones are connected and give me a status report?
evals.expected_output: Should attempt to verify each service (Firecrawl, Exa, Perplexity, Jina, Context7) with a lightweight test call and produce a status summary table showing which are connected vs not available.
